code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  mut ws = true
  while ws
    if i >= n
      ws = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          ws = false
        end
      when None
        ws = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i < n
    let start = i
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 43 or b == 45
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      0
    end

    mut digits = true
    while digits
      if i >= n
        digits = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            i = i + 1
          else
            digits = false
          end
        when None
          digits = false
        end
      end
    end

    let stop = i
    if stop > start
      let token = string.substring(input, start, stop)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        0
      end
    else
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
end

println("positive=#{count}")
